title: helichrysum pallens
intro: Helichrysum pallens is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow and white flowers, which are often used as a natural dye and in traditional medicine. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Helichrysum pallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
